title: Christmas Snowflake Hanging Swirls Decoration, 26 Pieces 3D Snowflake Silver Blue White with Ceiling Swirls for Christmas Decorations
features: ❄【Package Includes】Come with 26pcs Christmas hanging snowflake for 8pcs snowflakes and 18pcs swirls,suitable for Christmas ceiling decoration.
❄【Suitable Size】The size of large snowflake is 15x15cm.The little ones are 10x10cm.The length of the spiral pendant when unfolded is about 65cm(You can make them longer).
❄【Color&Material】SULOLI Christmas Snowflakes are made of strong craft paper,clear printing,bright color,such as baby blue,navy blue,silver and white.
❄【Eye-catching Design】Looking for a novel ceiling decoration?SULOLI hanging snowflakes are your best choice,can be used for home ceiling decoration,tree decoration,etc.
description: Product description Specifications Color: white,silver,navy,light blue Large snowflake diameter: 20 cm/ 7.9 inches Small snowflake diameter: 15 cm/6.0 inches Package includes: 8 x 3D snowflake 18 x Ceiling Swirl Warm notice: Please be careful in the decoration process to avoid being scratched by the sharp parts of the product. Safety Warning Caution Please be careful in the decoration process to avoid scratches caused by the sharp parts of the product.
